raw_consumer_statement:
After discovering an unauthorized credit card account opened under my name, I immediately contacted the company 's credit card service to report this fraudulent activity. It was distressing to learn that not only had someone managed to open a credit card account without my knowledge or consent, but they had also made a fraudulent purchase at a store located in XXXX, XXXX. 

Living in XXXX, it was clear that I couldn't have possibly been present at the mentioned store on XX/XX/2024. Furthermore, upon receiving the bill statement, I noticed that the store credit card didn't even bear my full name. It became evident that someone had maliciously obtained and misused my personal information for their own gain. 

I promptly reached out to the customer service department of the company again after receiving the bill in XX/XX/2024. They assured me that they would close the unauthorized credit card account ; however, much to my surprise and frustration, they still demanded payment of {$620.00} dollars along with a monthly late fee of {$30.00} dollars. 

It is important for all parties involved to recognize that this situation has caused significant inconvenience and stress in my life. As an innocent victim of identity theft and fraudulence, I am seeking fair resolution from both legal and ethical standpoints.
